fields.name: db_layout_rollup_intent_path
fields.description: Path to upstream db-layout-rollup intent JSON. When present, used for cascade topology + Ib + In + load_type + selectivity status per circuit. When absent, engineer must declare all circuits inline.

fields.name: fault_level_intent_path
fields.description: Path to upstream fault-level intent JSON. When present, used for per-node Ik"max + Ik"min + X/R + Z. When absent, engineer must declare per-node Ifault.

fields.name: circuits_declared
fields.description: Used only when db-layout-rollup intent is absent. Array of {node_id, parent_node_id, designation, load: {ib_a, in_a, phases, load_type, pf}}.

fields.name: t_clear_declared_per_node
fields.description: Engineer-declared OCPD clearing times per node when not provided by db-layout-rollup selectivity output. Keys = node_id, values = seconds.

fields.name: length_m
fields.description: Cable run length per cascade node (m).

fields.name: ambient_c
fields.description: Ambient temperature (°C) at the cable run.

fields.name: grouping_count
fields.description: Number of loaded circuits in proximity (Cg derating input).

fields.name: harmonic_content_pct
fields.description: Triplen harmonic content as % of fundamental on the neutral conductor; triggers Ch derating when > 15%.

fields.name: terminal_temp_rating_c
fields.description: US jurisdiction only — terminal temp per NEC 110.14(C). Caps ampacity column selection.

fields.name: cable_type_preference
fields.default_by_context: pvc_singles for domestic; xlpe for commercial feeders

fields.name: vd_target_overrides
fields.description: Per-circuit Vd limit override when client spec is tighter than jurisdictional default. Keys = node_id, values = limit %.
